title: duplication of the subitems is created when the automation trigger is expected when adding a person in the person column, if more than one person are assigned in people column
excerpt:

posts.author: ransx (ran)
posts.cookedHtml:
when use automation to create subitems by assigned people in “People” column ,multiple subitems will be created for previous assigned people, and only one item will be created for the last assigned people.

as Monday will still detect the previous person you assigned to the same person column and meeting the condition for your automation. And creating another subitems for the previous assigned in the same people column.

for example, I’ve assigned 2 people in a “People” column, and I use the automation to create subitem for these assigned 2 people, when trigger the automation, THREE sub items will be created for the assigned 2 people, 2 of them are for the first person.

if 3 people assigned, then THREE subitems will be created for the first person, and TWO subitems for the 2nd person, and ONE for the 3rd person

What I expect is when assigned more than one person into same “People” column, and only one subitem will be created accordingly to for the assigned people.
